intended_use: CLEWICU provides the clinician with physiological insight into a patient's likelihood of future hemodynamic instability. CLEWICU is intended for use in hospital critical care settings for patients 18
intended_use_full: CLEWICU provides the clinician with physiological insight into a patient's likelihood of future hemodynamic instability. CLEWICU is intended for use in hospital critical care settings for patients 18 years and over. CLEWICU is considered to provide additional information regarding the patient's predicted future risk for clinical deterioration, as well as identifying patients at low risk for deterioration. The product predictions are for reference only and no therapeutic decisions should be made based solely on the CLEWICU predictions.
target_condition: Future hemodynamic instability and clinical deterioration in critical care patients
ground_truth: Occurrence of clinically significant hemodynamic events requiring vasopressor/inotrope support and clinical deterioration as documented in patient records from UMass eICU and MIMIC-III datasets
other_metrics: 95% confidence intervals provided for all primary metrics; performance evaluated across two independent datasets with temporal validation
